title: JumpCash
description: A plugin that gives u cash per jump
body:
JumpCash Plugin: Turn Your Jumps Into Cash!

JumpCash is a unique and engaging Minecraft plugin that rewards players for doing something they already do hundreds of times per session - jumping! With JumpCash, each jump translates directly into in-game currency, creating a fun and passive way for players to earn money while playing naturally.

Key Features:

Jump-to-Money Conversion: Players earn a configurable amount of money (default $1) for every jump they make.

Vault Integration: Seamlessly connects with your server's economy system through Vault
.
Milestone Rewards: Encourages long-term play with special bonus rewards when players reach jumping milestones (100, 500, 1000, 5000, and 10000 jumps).

Customizable Configuration: Easily adjust reward amounts, messages, permissions, and milestone values.

Cooldown System: Optional cooldown timer prevents abuse and spam jumping.

Player Statistics: Players can check their total jumps and earnings with a simple command.

Permission Support: Optional permission control for who can earn money from jumping.

Colorful Notifications: Customizable messages notify players when they earn money or reach milestones.

Why Choose JumpCash?

Enhances Player Experience

JumpCash transforms a common action into a rewarding experience, making every jump count. Players will find themselves naturally earning money just by playing the game as they normally would.

Balanced Economy Integration

The plugin provides a passive income source that's balanced and doesn't disrupt your server's economy. The configurable reward amounts and optional cooldown system ensure that JumpCash enhances your economy without breaking it.

Encourages Active Play

With milestone rewards, players are motivated to stay active on your server to reach the next big reward threshold, increasing player retention and engagement.

Server Uniqueness

Set your server apart with this unique economy feature that players won't find on most other servers. It's a small but memorable addition that can help make your server stand out.

Lightweight and Reliable

JumpCash is optimized for minimal performance impact, ensuring your server runs smoothly even with many active players jumping around.
Commands:

/jumpcash stats - View your personal jump statistics

/jumpcash info - View current reward values and milestone information

/jumpcash reload - Reload the configuration (admin only)

The JumpCash plugin is perfect for survival, towny, factions, or any server where economy plays a role. Players will love the extra income stream that rewards them for something they're already doing!
